positive: A cyberpunk, hyperdetailed illustration of a rainy Tokyo street corner at night. Neon signs in Japanese script reflect off the wet asphalt. Focus on volumetric lighting, steam rising from manholes, and futuristic holographic advertisements. Cinematic, gritty, high contrast, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
